name: ClusterCAD List PKS Clusters
description: Retrieve a list of PKS clusters from the ClusterCAD database, optionally filtering to reviewed clusters only.

inputs.name: reviewed_only
inputs.description: If true, return only manually reviewed PKS clusters. If false, return all clusters including machine-annotated ones. Defaults to true.

inputs.name: max_results
inputs.description: Maximum number of clusters to return. Defaults to 20, maximum is 500.

outputs.description: List of PKS clusters, each with 'accession' (MIBiG accession string, e.g. 'BGC0000055') and 'description' (human-readable cluster name).
